inputs.label: Annual Salary (USD)
inputs.businessContext: Total gross annual compensation before taxes and deductions.

businessContext_i18n.en: Total gross annual compensation before taxes and deductions.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Vergi ve kesintiler öncesi toplam brüt yıllık ücret.
businessContext_i18n.de: Gesamtes jährliches Bruttogehalt vor Steuern und Abzügen
businessContext_i18n.fr: Rémunération brute annuelle totale avant impôts et déductions.
businessContext_i18n.es: Compensación anual total bruta antes de impuestos y deducciones.
businessContext_i18n.ar: إجمالي التعويض السنوي الإجمالي قبل الضرائب والخصومات.

inputs.label: Work Hours per Week
inputs.businessContext: Standard contractual weekly working hours, excluding unpaid breaks.

businessContext_i18n.en: Standard contractual weekly working hours, excluding unpaid breaks.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Ücretsiz molalar hariç standart sözleşmeli haftalık çalışma saatleri.
businessContext_i18n.de: Standardmäßige vertragliche Wochenarbeitszeit ohne unbezahlte Pausen
businessContext_i18n.fr: Heures hebdomadaires contractuelles standard, hors pauses non rémunérées.
businessContext_i18n.es: Horas semanales contractuales estándar, excluyendo descansos no remunerados.
businessContext_i18n.ar: ساعات العمل الأسبوعية التعاقدية القياسية، باستثناء فترات الراحة غير مدفوعة الأجر.

inputs.label: Paid Weeks per Year
inputs.businessContext: Total weeks compensated including vacation, sick leave, and holidays.

businessContext_i18n.en: Total weeks compensated including vacation, sick leave, and holidays.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Tatil, hastalık izni ve resmi tatiller dahil toplam ücretli hafta sayısı.
businessContext_i18n.de: Gesamte bezahlte Wochen inklusive Urlaub, Krankheit und Feiertage
businessContext_i18n.fr: Nombre total de semaines rémunérées, y compris les congés, arrêts maladie et jours fériés.
businessContext_i18n.es: Total de semanas compensadas incluyendo vacaciones, licencia por enfermedad y días festivos.
businessContext_i18n.ar: إجمالي الأسابيع المعوضة بما في ذلك الإجازة والإجازة المرضية والعطلات الرسمية.

inputs.label: Overtime Multiplier
inputs.businessContext: Standard overtime pay factor per FLSA or local labor law (e.g., 1.5x for >40 hrs/week).

businessContext_i18n.en: Standard overtime pay factor per FLSA or local labor law (e.g., 1.5x for >40 hrs/week).
businessContext_i18n.tr: FLSA veya yerel iş kanununa göre standart fazla mesai ücret faktörü (örn. haftada >40 saat için 1,5x).
businessContext_i18n.de: Standard-Überstundenfaktor gemäß FLSA oder lokalem Arbeitsrecht (z. B. 1,5x bei >40 Std./Woche)
businessContext_i18n.fr: Facteur de majoration des heures supplémentaires standard selon la loi locale (ex. 1,5x pour >40 h/semaine).
businessContext_i18n.es: Factor de pago de horas extra estándar según FLSA o ley laboral local (ej., 1.5x por >40 hrs/semana).
businessContext_i18n.ar: عامل أجر العمل الإضافي القياسي وفقًا لقانون معايير العمل العادلة أو قانون العمل المحلي (مثل 1.5x لأكثر من 40 ساعة/أسبوع).

inputs.label: Benefits & Overhead (% of Salary)
inputs.businessContext: Percentage of salary allocated to benefits (health, retirement, payroll taxes, training).

label_i18n.fr: Avantages sociaux & frais généraux (% du salaire)
label_i18n.es: Beneficios y gastos generales (% del salario)

businessContext_i18n.en: Percentage of salary allocated to benefits (health, retirement, payroll taxes, training).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Yan haklara (sağlık, emeklilik, bordro vergileri, eğitim) ayrılan maaş yüzdesi.
businessContext_i18n.de: Prozentsatz des Gehalts für Zusatzleistungen (Krankenversicherung, Altersvorsorge, Lohnsteuer, Schulungen)
businessContext_i18n.fr: Pourcentage du salaire alloué aux avantages sociaux (santé, retraite, charges sociales, formation).
businessContext_i18n.es: Porcentaje del salario asignado a beneficios (salud, jubilación, impuestos sobre nómina, capacitación).
businessContext_i18n.ar: النسبة المئوية من الراتب المخصصة للمزايا (الصحة، التقاعد، ضرائب الرواتب، التدريب).

inputs.label: Shift Type
inputs.businessContext: Shift differentials affect effective hourly cost; night/rotating shifts may require premium pay.

businessContext_i18n.en: Shift differentials affect effective hourly cost; night/rotating shifts may require premium pay.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Vardiya farkları efektif saatlik maliyeti etkiler; gece/dönüşümlü vardiyalar prim gerektirebilir.
businessContext_i18n.de: Schichtzulagen beeinflussen die effektiven Stundenkosten; Nacht-/Wechselschichten können Zuschläge erfordern
businessContext_i18n.fr: Les primes de poste affectent le coût horaire effectif ; les postes de nuit/rotatifs peuvent nécessiter une prime.
businessContext_i18n.es: Los diferenciales de turno afectan el costo horario efectivo; los turnos nocturnos/rotativos pueden requerir pago adicional.
businessContext_i18n.ar: فروق الورديات تؤثر على التكلفة الفعلية للساعة؛ قد تتطلب الورديات الليلية/المتناوبة أجرًا إضافيًا.

inputs.label: Include Productivity Factor (Lean)
inputs.businessContext: If true, applies a productivity loss factor (e.g., 85%) based on typical industrial engineering allowances.

businessContext_i18n.en: If true, applies a productivity loss factor (e.g., 85%) based on typical industrial engineering allowances.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Doğruysa, tipik endüstri mühendisliği paylarına dayalı bir verimlilik kaybı faktörü (örn. %85) uygular.
businessContext_i18n.de: Wenn aktiviert, wird ein Produktivitätsverlustfaktor (z. B. 85 %) basierend auf typischen Arbeitsstudienzulagen angewendet
businessContext_i18n.fr: Si vrai, applique un facteur de perte de productivité (ex. 85 %) basé sur les tolérances typiques du génie industriel.
businessContext_i18n.es: Si es verdadero, aplica un factor de pérdida de productividad (ej., 85%) basado en tolerancias típicas de ingeniería industrial.
businessContext_i18n.ar: إذا كان صحيحًا، يطبق عامل فقدان الإنتاجية (مثل 85%) بناءً على بدلات الهندسة الصناعية النموذجية.

rules.message: Work hours per week must be greater than 0.
Paid weeks per year must be between 1 and 52.
Overtime multiplier must be between 1 and 3.
Benefits percentage must be between 0 and 100.
Shift type must be one of: day, night, rotating.

thresholds.message: Calculated hourly rate is below US federal minimum wage. Verify inputs.
Overtime cost per hour exceeds $100. Consider hiring additional staff.
Benefits overhead exceeds 50% of salary. Review benefit plans for cost efficiency.
